heading: Perishable agricultural commodities
label: 5906 Perishable agricultural commodities
text: does not apply to a container or trailer the contents of which are perishable agricultural commodities (as defined in the Perishable Agricultural Commodities Act, 1930 ( et seq.)).Section 5905 of this title7 U.S.C. 499a
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)590649:508(g)(2)(C).

References in TextThe Perishable Agricultural Commodities Act, 1930, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to chapter 20A (§ 499a et seq.) of Title 7, Agriculture.
